top_signals.title: Qualcomm CEO says AI agents will replace apps — as chip giant works on 40 new AI-powered devices
top_signals.summary: Qualcomm CEO Cristiano Amon said he is bullish on smart glasses which could eventually become as big as the smartphone.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
